title: Shopping Cart
subtitle: Review your selected tours, schedules, and details before booking
empty_desc: Explore our premium handpicked tours around Da Nang and find your next adventure.
items_count: {count, plural, =0 {No tours} =1 {1 Tour} other {# Tours}} in cart
promo_apply_success: Promo code applied successfully. {discount}% discount added.
capacity_warning: Warning: Only {available} seats remaining for this schedule.
expired_warning: This schedule is no longer available. Please select another date.
checkout_no_active: Please select at least one valid tour to continue.
checkout_capacity_error: Cannot continue checkout. Tour "{tourName}" exceeds the remaining capacity ({availableSeats} seats left).
checkout_multi_info: Booking tour "{tourName}" now. After checkout, return to your cart to book the remaining {remainingTours} tours.
multi_booking_hint: Each tour is booked separately. After finishing the first checkout, return to your cart to book the next tour.
confirm_delete_selected: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected items?
confirm_delete_all: Are you sure you want to delete all items from your cart?
